item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the immediate request to add a template field and correctly moves upstream to offer approval/source-of-truth plus a send gate. However, it does not explicitly identify the pattern of three prior downstream field additions followed by a fourth field request, and its redesign is still framed as adding another required field rather than a broader consolidation of the repeated capture-field failure. Partial anti-spiral behavior, not full pass."}
